description: Ralph backlog to remediate all empty local production tables with real official-source data, or explicitly classify them as allowed-empty before VPS deployment. No fake seeds, no fixture data, and no VPS deployment in this phase.

userStories.title: Create authoritative table remediation registry
userStories.description: Create a machine-readable registry for all 163 public tables with owner domain, expected population status, official source family, ingestion path, verification SQL, and deployment classification.
acceptanceCriteria: Every public table appears exactly once in the registry
Each table is classified as populated, allowed_empty, or blocker
Each blocker has an official source URL family and target worker/script
Each allowed_empty table has a reason such as incident-only, audit-only, eval-only, user-generated, or derived-only
A verification script fails non-zero if an unclassified empty table exists

userStories.title: Add local table gate command
userStories.description: Implement a repeatable local gate that reads the table remediation registry, queries local Postgres, and blocks deployment when required tables are empty or populated with unapproved fixture/seed provenance.
acceptanceCriteria: Gate command runs locally against Docker Postgres without VPS access
Gate reports counts for populated, allowed_empty, and blocker tables
Gate fails if any blocker table has zero rows
Gate fails if compliance tables contain source URLs outside official allowlisted domains
Gate output is appended to Ralph progress after each successful story

userStories.title: Remediate IRNR official tables
userStories.description: Populate IRNR model instruction and withholding-rate tables from AEAT/BOE official sources, extending the fixed IRNR model discovery worker.
acceptanceCriteria: irnr_instruccion has official AEAT instruction rows for current IRNR models where AEAT publishes instruction pages
irnr_withholding_rate has current official-source rows with source_url, effective_date, legal_basis, and uncertainty notes
No rates are hardcoded from non-official seed scripts
Malformed or missing AEAT pages are logged as partial with data_freshness_warning metadata, not silently ignored
Focused tests and docker run-once worker execution pass

userStories.title: Remediate PGC official accounting tables
userStories.description: Replace unverified PGC seed assumptions with a BOE-backed PGC ingestion path for chart of accounts, valuation rules, financial statements, and PGC-to-tax references where official references exist.
acceptanceCriteria: pgc_marco, pgc_norma_valoracion, pgc_cuenta, and pgc_estado_financiero are populated from BOE official consolidated or official publication sources
pgc_cuenta rows include legal_basis/source_url/provenance fields or a linked source record
pgc_cuenta_fiscal_ref and pgc_cuenta_modelo_aeat_ref are populated only where mappings are official or marked as human-reviewed derived metadata
Existing corrupted/static seed data is not used as authoritative input
PGC API tests and table gate pass for the PGC group

userStories.title: Remediate document decomposition tables
userStories.description: Backfill document fragment, section, CNMV version, and lineage tables from already-ingested official documents, preserving traceability to the source document and ingestion run.
acceptanceCriteria: documento_fragmento and documento_seccion are populated from documento_interpretativo rows with official source_url
documento_cnmv_version is populated for CNMV documents where versioning can be inferred or fetched from official CNMV metadata
data_lineage links derived rows to exact source records and worker sync_log rows
No derived fragment is treated as authoritative without source document reference
Search/retrieval tests prove fragments do not cross-contaminate source families

userStories.title: Remediate XBRL and PGC-XBRL tables
userStories.description: Populate XBRL taxonomy and filing/fact tables using official taxonomy packages and official filing sources, or classify filing/fact tables as allowed-empty until a real filing ingestion target is configured.
acceptanceCriteria: xbrl_taxonomy is populated from official ESEF/ESMA or IFRS taxonomy sources
pgc_xbrl_mapping is populated only from documented official mapping or explicitly human-reviewed derived mapping
xbrl_filing and xbrl_fact are either populated from official CNMV/ESEF filings or classified allowed_empty with a clear rationale
Fixture-first test data is not counted as production-real data
XBRL API tests and table gate pass for this group

userStories.title: Classify eval, review, alert, and incident tables as allowed-empty
userStories.description: Mark event-only operational tables as allowed-empty where zero rows is the correct healthy state, while preserving their schema and observability checks.
acceptanceCriteria: data_freshness_alerts, eval_run, eval_query, human_review, ai_model_registry, embedding_version, and similar operational tables are classified individually
Allowed-empty reason is explicit and reviewable
Gate verifies tables exist, RLS is enabled, and writes are possible in tests without requiring production rows
No fake alert/review/eval rows are inserted just to satisfy counts

userStories.title: Remediate financial regulatory domain tables
userStories.description: For AIFMD, UCITS, SFDR, PRIIPs, MiFID, MAR, DORA, CRD/BRRD/EMIR, PSD2, SEPA, LIVMC, and transparency tables, either connect each table to an official EU/Spanish regulatory source or classify as target-state blockers.
acceptanceCriteria: Each table has official source family assigned: EUR-Lex, CNMV, Banco de Espana, EBA, ESMA, BOE, or other approved authority
Tables with entity-specific data are populated only from official registries or filings, not examples
Tables without an implemented official ingestion worker remain blockers, not fake-populated
At least one representative domain group has a run-once worker and sync_log evidence before this story can pass
Gate reports remaining domain blockers with source and implementation estimate

userStories.title: Remediate ownership, PBC, fraud, and screening tables
userStories.description: Populate AML/PBC, beneficial ownership, screening, and fraud-risk tables only from official registries, official documents, or clearly marked user-generated workflow inputs.
acceptanceCriteria: beneficial_owner_record, ownership_relation, ownership_share, ubo_record, pbc_* and screening_* tables have official/user-generated classification
BORME-derived rows link back to official BORME documents where used
SEPBLAC/PBC references link to official SEPBLAC/BOE documents
Workflow-only tables are allowed_empty until a real user case exists
No synthetic companies or people are inserted as production data

userStories.title: Final local deployment evidence package
userStories.description: Run all local table gates, worker run-once checks, API/MCP checks, and produce a final deployment decision report for the VPS.
acceptanceCriteria: All earlier TABLE stories are passes:true
Zero unclassified empty tables remain
Zero compliance blocker tables remain empty
All populated compliance rows have official source provenance or explicit human-reviewed derived status
Final report states PRODUCTION READY, CONDITIONAL PASS, or BLOCKED for VPS deployment
